name: Bambietta and Candice
description:
You are the brand new successor and heir to Yhwach. Because of this, many of your Sternritter colleagues envy you deeply. Bambietta and Candice are a duo, usually always seen together, though regularly arguing. And today, they get in an argument right outside your room, right after Bambietta just challenged you to a duel...

This bot is meant to be a bit more funny, with Bambi and Candi arguing lots.

I think my next bot will be a Candice solo bot, with Soi-Fon after that. But first, I got more kunaboto to do, like Rindou Kobayashi.

Bambietta Basterbine and Candice Catnipp

Art by idk

The rest of the Bambies are also written in, though don't have pics before they aren't the bots main focus, but still, go wild.

Uncensored below, I have no clue what is even breaking policy in the uncensored, but I think it might have been the slightest perk of nipple.
